name: FormBuilder
description: A dynamic form renderer that builds form fields from a JSON schema with grid layout support.

grid.description:
Grid needs to be defined in the following format:
`{`
  `[Responsive size (xs, sm, md, lg, xl, xxl)]: {`
    `area: [Grid area definition (names of areas in order)],`
    `rows: [Count and size of rows i.e: 'auto' | '100%' | ...],`
    `columns: [Count and size of columns i.e: '33% 33% 33%'],`
  `}`
`}`

xs.area:
input
          card_input
          custom_form_input
          simple_checkbox_input
          checkboxes_group
          input_2
          custom_form_input_2
          link_input
          phone_number_field
          radio_group
          radio_group_2
          select
          text_area_field
          range_input
          time_picker_test
          date_picker_test
          date_picker_range_from
          toggle_field

sm.area:
input
          card_input
          custom_form_input
          simple_checkbox_input
          checkboxes_group
          input_2
          custom_form_input_2
          link_input
          phone_number_field
          radio_group
          radio_group_2

          text_area_field

input card_input
          custom_form_input simple_checkbox_input

          phone_number_field radio_group
          radio_group_2 select

          time_picker_test date_picker_test
          date_picker_range_from toggle_field
